---
title: "Helen Beatrice Anderson Morshead"
---

## Helen Beatrice Anderson Morshead

**Dates:** (1853/4-1922)

**Maiden name:** (Anderson Morshead)

### Description

cousin of CMY, sister of Mary Anderson Morshead

### Biography

Known as Beatrice, a member of the Gosling Society as ‘Queen Bee’, she married (1880)  her cousin John Yonge Anderson Morshead (1846-1923), barrister. They lived at Salcombe. At the time of the 1871 census she was a pupil at Mary Anne Dyson’s school at Crondall. [1861, 71 census]

### Letters

- Letter from September 22, 1878
- Letter from Aug 17th [1876]
- Letter from July 2nd 1873
- Letter from Jan 1st [1872]
- Letter from January 19, 1869

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
